finalizer.boundary: Finalizer may compactly record proven school PASS results. It must not commit raw .runtime files and must not change owner-facing school launch fields.

merge_queue_after_intake.boundary: After PASS school proof and intake submit, finalizer may merge its own queued School packet through merge queue only when repo is clean and no merge lock exists.

queue_maintenance_after_school_merge.boundary: After school packet merge succeeds, finalizer may synchronously maintain at most one queued AgentLife packet through merge queue with bounded timeout. No daemon and no direct memory writes.
